title: Dungeons End Stone
description: Makes end stone look like the end stone from Minecraft Dungeons using CTM
body:
![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19d332cdab77737cd016fd7c1ae13efef260cbc7_0.webp)

Using CTM, End Stone in the End dimension will have different variants like the ones in Minecraft Dungeons depending on which of the three biomes it generates in. The End highlands, midlands, and barrens biomes are always next to eachother, creating a gradual layered apperance with the new textures.

![Dependencies](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/032b3169badbdce870ae6ae179be88f8150e0e9a_0.webp)

[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
